title: About Us
note: Supports company description, business scale, operating divisions, customer relationships, and global footprint.

title: Our Capabilities
note: Documents Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth Health Services as the company's two main divisions and describes their care, cost, and health-services roles.

title: About Cigna Healthcare
note: Supports the Cigna Healthcare product profile as the health-benefits provider within The Cigna Group.

title: The Cigna Group 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary filing source for 2025 business segments, revenue, net income, and risk context.

title: The Cigna Group Financials and Income Statement
note: Market-data summary used to cross-check 2025 revenue and net income figures.

title: The Cigna Group Market Cap and Net Worth
note: Supports the May 2026 market capitalization estimate.

title: Cigna Group PE Ratio Current and Historical Data
note: Provides the May 2026 trailing P/E ratio snapshot.

title: OpenMRS
note: Documents OpenMRS as an open-source medical records platform with broad global deployment and standards-oriented APIs.

title: GNU Health Download
note: Documents GNU Health as a free/libre health and hospital information system with EMR, HMIS, personal health record, API hub, and federation components.

title: CMS Interoperability and Prior Authorization Final Rule CMS-0057-F
note: Supports the interoperability and prior-authorization API enabler thesis for payer workflow modularization.

title: Trusted Exchange Framework and Common Agreement
publisher: Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology
note: Supports the health-information exchange and federated data-sharing enabler thesis.

title: Pharmacy Benefit Managers: The Powerful Middlemen Inflating Drug Costs and Squeezing Main Street Pharmacies
note: Documents official scrutiny of PBM market concentration, opacity, pricing incentives, and pharmacy pressure.

title: FTC Sues Prescription Drug Middlemen for Artificially Inflating Insulin Drug Prices
note: Supports the problem statement for PBM rebate incentives and anticompetitive allegations involving Express Scripts and other large PBMs.
